description: Documented exceptions to the 7-day quarantine in check-package-freshness.mjs. Each entry MUST cite a risk review and carry an expiry date; the script ignores expired entries so stale waivers fail loudly. Matched by exact { name, version } pairs.

entries.name: @tanstack/react-router
entries.reason: CVE-2026-45321 risk review (commit ada09252): bumped past the malicious 1.169.5-1.169.8 window. 1.170.4 is the lowest non-vulnerable post-patch release at audit time.

entries.name: @tanstack/react-router-devtools
entries.reason: CVE-2026-45321 risk review (commit ada09252): bumped past the malicious 1.166.x window. 1.167.0 is the lowest non-vulnerable post-patch release at audit time.

entries.name: @tanstack/react-router-ssr-query
entries.reason: CVE-2026-45321 risk review (commit ada09252): bumped past the malicious 1.166.x window. 1.167.0 is the lowest non-vulnerable post-patch release at audit time.

entries.name: @tanstack/react-start
entries.reason: CVE-2026-45321 risk review (commit ada09252): bumped past the malicious 1.167.x window. 1.168.6 is the lowest non-vulnerable post-patch release at audit time.

entries.name: nitro
entries.reason: nitro 3.x is pre-release-only (no stable release exists); 3.0.260522-beta is the npm `latest` and the documented Vercel deploy server layer (savepoint-tanstack/docs/vercel-deployment.md). TanStack Start does not bundle nitro transitively, so it is a direct exact pin. 2026-05-23 audit (SCS-04) risk review: deliberate beta dependency, not an accidental fresh-publish. Re-pin to a stable release when nitro 3.x ships one.
